---
title: "Michael Cusack-Nelkin"
subtitle: "Master's Student | Mathematics of Finance | Columbia University"
about:
  template: solana
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: google
      text: Email
      href: mc5882@columbia.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/michael-cusack-nelkin
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/MichaelCusackNelkin?tab=repositories
---

I am a master's student in the [Mathematics of Finance (MAFN)](https://www.math.columbia.edu/mafn/) program at [Columbia University](https://www.columbia.edu/). Prior to joining Columbia, I worked at Deloitte Consulting LLP for three years. My research focuses on constructing **optimal equity portfolios** using return forecasts, covariance and volatility estimates, and trading cost models. My favorite things to do outside of research are to read The Lord of the Rings, solve problems on [Project Euler](https://projecteuler.net/), and hangout with my wife and puppy.

## Education

Columbia University | New York City, NY
M.A in Mathematics | Aug 2025 - Dec 2026

The College of William & Mary | Williamsburg, VA
B.S in Physics | Aug 2018 - May 2022

## Research Interests

- Optimal Portfolio Construction
- Forecasting
- Covariance Estimation
- Impact Modeling
- Optimal Execution
